schedule.label: Schedule
schedule.pendingSecondary: Check the official website schedule section.

overview.paragraph1: Bigsound Festival has established itself as one of the leading pop and indie events in the Valencian Community. Hosted in the city of Valencia, it pairs international headliners with emerging Spanish artists and delivers a polished production aimed at a multi-generational audience.
overview.paragraph2: Two days of live music, Mediterranean food trucks and chill zones tuned to the Valencian summer. Easy public-transport access from downtown and a side programme of activities that kicks off in the afternoon.

overview.paragraph1: Latin Fest is the reference festival for reggaeton and Latin urban music in the Valencian Community. Tight lineup of major names in the genre and a production designed for a young crowd looking for spectacle, dance and Mediterranean energy.
overview.paragraph2: The main venue is in Valencia city, usually paired with a stop in Benidorm. Easy public-transport access, hydration zones, Latin food trucks and a festive summer atmosphere.

overview.paragraph1: Medusa Festival is one of the most important electronic music festivals in Europe and a must-watch highlight of the Spanish summer. Held on the spectacular beach of Cullera, Valencia, it brings together some of the best international DJs and artists for five days in a unique setting by the Mediterranean Sea.
overview.paragraph2: With more than 300,000 m² of venue space, spectacular themed stages, large-format audiovisual production, and an unmatched immersive experience, Medusa Festival attracts thousands of attendees from all over the world every year in search of music, spectacle, and an unforgettable atmosphere.

posterGallery.title: Official Posters
posterGallery.intro: The main poster and the day-by-day visual line-up so the whole week can be scanned at a glance.

overview.paragraph1: Reggaeton Beach Festival turns the Alicante coast into an epicentre of Latin urban music for a weekend. Main stop in Benidorm with a lineup of major reggaeton names, a beach-club format and a daytime party crowd.
overview.paragraph2: Beachside venue, Latin food trucks, themed bars and an afterparty calendar at clubs in the area. Easy access from Alicante and connections to the main Benidorm hotels.

overview.paragraph1: Reve Festival is the night-time pop highlight of the Valencian summer, with a mainstream-oriented lineup and large-format visual spectacle. Built for large audiences, it prioritises staging and sound quality over the classic open-air festival formula.
overview.paragraph2: Located in Valencia city, it offers a comfortable experience with strong public-transport access, nearby hotels, food zones, and audiovisual productions that stretch the night until late.

overview.paragraph1: Zevra Festival is an urban and Latin experience held by the Mediterranean, on Cullera beach (Valencia). Four days with a lineup centered on reggaeton, latin and urban, in a venue designed to combine music, beach, and summer party.
overview.paragraph2: Large-scale production, multiple stages, Mediterranean and Latin food-truck zones, and an afterparty calendar that extends to nearby clubs. Easy drive from Valencia city.

brand.description: Your festival guide for the Valencian Community. Music, culture and summer.
